text: # FloCard Overview FloCard is a digital business card platform developed by 366Pi Technologies. Users can create, manage, and share digital business cards using QR codes and digital links. FloCard

promotes sustainable networking by reducing the need for traditional paper business cards. Key Features: - Digital Business Cards - QR Code Sharing - Contact Management - Organization Profiles - Sustainability

# New Engineer Onboarding Guide New engineers should: 1. Understand company products. 2. Set up local development environment. 3. Learn project workflows. 4. Access project documentation. 5. Participate in team
meetings. Best Practices: - Write clean code. - Document changes. - Test before deployment. - Follow coding standards.

# 366Pi Technologies 366Pi Technologies is a technology company focused on digital transformation, networking solutions, and innovative digital products. The company develops platforms that help individuals, organizations, and communities connect

and share information efficiently. Products: - FloCard - Digital Networking Solutions Mission: To simplify professional networking through digital-first solutions. Vision: To create sustainable and innovative digital experiences.
# Engineering FAQ Q: What is FloCard? A: FloCard is a digital business card platform developed by 366Pi Technologies. Q: Why use digital business cards? A: They are sustainable, easy
to share, and easier to update than paper cards. Q: What database is used in this project? A: ChromaDB is used as the vector database. Q: Which LLM is used?
